title: Fix-bug Finalize phase gate — collate must succeed before bug closes
description: Add a Finalize phase gate to fix_bug.md that checks for INDEX.md existence in the bug directory before allowing the workflow to mark the bug as resolved. Collate must succeed; the bug cannot close without it.

plan.objective: Add a Finalize phase gate to meta-fix-bug.md that blocks bug closure until collate produces INDEX.md, preventing bugs from reaching resolved status without knowledge-base artifacts.
key_changes: Add finalize phase gate block to meta-fix-bug.md (artifact check for bug INDEX.md)
Update Algorithm step 6 to run preflight-gate.cjs --phase finalize before marking bug as fixed
Handle exit 1 (gate failed) and exit 2 (misconfiguration) with escalation
Add 2 unit tests for finalize gate (blocks when missing, passes when present)
